description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1), operating in manual mode, was traveling northeast on 3rd Avenue toward Norfolk St in San Mateo. The Zoox 
vehicle was stopped in the right through lane behind traffic for a red traffic signal, when it was rear ended by a passenger car (Vehicle 2) that
 was traveling directly behind. There was no visible damage to either vehicle and the police were not called. The safety operator of the Zoox 
vehicle reported back pain a few days after the collision. Zoox vehicle camera footage shows that the driver of the passenger car may not 
have been looking ahead at the roadway prior to and at the time of contact.
Print
Clear Form
